H3800.strongs_def: properly, something carved out, i.e. ore; hence, gold (pure as originally mined)

H3801.derivation: or כֻּתֹּנֶת; from an unused root meaning to cover (compare H3802 (כָּתֵף));

H3802.derivation: from an unused root meaning to clothe;
H3802.strongs_def: the shoulder (proper, i.e. upper end of the arm; as being the spot where the garments hang); figuratively, side-piece or lateral projection of anything
H3802.usage: side(34x), shoulders(22x), shoulderpieces(4x), undersetters(4x), corner(2x), arm(1x)

H3803.strongs_def: to enclose; hence (in a friendly sense) to crown, (in a hostile one) to besiege; also to wait (as restraining oneself)
H3803.kjv_def: beset round, compass about, be crowned inclose round, suffer.

H3804.strongs_def: properly, a circlet, i.e. a diadem

H3807.kjv_def: beat (down, to pieces), break in pieces, crushed, destroy, discomfit, smite, stamp. l
H3807.usage: beat(4x), destroyed(3x), smite(2x), discomfited(1x), crushed(1x), stamped(1x)

H3808.derivation: or לוֹא; or לֹה; (Deuteronomy 3:11), a primitive particle;
H3808.strongs_def: not (the simple or abs. negation); by implication, no; often used with other particles
H3808.kjv_def: [idiom] before, [phrase] or else, ere, [phrase] except, ig(-norant), much, less, nay, neither, never, no((-ne), -r, (-thing)), ([idiom] as though...,(can-), for) not (out of), of nought, otherwise, out of, [phrase] surely, [phrase] as truly as, [phrase] of a truth, [phrase] verily, for want, [phrase] whether, without.

H3809.strongs_def: {not (the simple or abs. negation); by implication, no;}
H3809.kjv_def: or even, neither, no(-ne, -r), (can-) not, as nothing, without.
H3809.usage: not(49x), no(9x), nor(9x), without(4x), neither(3x), none(3x), ever(1x), nothing(1x)

H3810.derivation: or לוֹ דבַר; (Samuel 9:4,5), or לִדְבִר; (Joshua 13:26), (probably rather לֹדְבַר ); from H3808 (לֹא) and H1699 (דֹּבֶר); pastureless;

H3811.strongs_def: to tire; (figuratively) to be (or make) disgusted

H3814.derivation: from H3813 (לָאַט) (or perhaps for active participle of H3874 (לוּט));

H3815.derivation: from the prepositional prefix and H410 (אֵל); (belonging) to God;

H3816.derivation: or לְאוֹם; from an unused root meaning to gather;

H3818.derivation: from H3808 (לֹא) and H5971 (עַם) with pronominal suffix; not my people;
H3818.strongs_def: Lo-Ammi, the symbolic name of a son of Hosea

H3819.derivation: from H3808 (לֹא) and H7355 (רָחַם); not pitied;
H3819.strongs_def: Lo-Ruchamah, the symbolic name of a son of Hosea

H3820.strongs_def: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
H3820.kjv_def: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom] I, kindly, midst, mind(-ed), [idiom] regard(-ed), [idiom] themselves, [idiom] unawares, understanding, [idiom] well, willingly, wisdom.
H3820.usage: heart(508x), mind(12x), midst(11x), understanding(10x), hearted(7x), wisdom(6x), comfortably(4x), well(4x), considered(2x), friendly(2x), kindly(2x)

H3821.strongs_def: {the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything}

H3823.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to be enclosed (as if with fat); by implication (as denominative from H3824 (לֵבָב));  to unheart;  also as denominative from H3834 (לָבִיבָה) i.e.
H3823.strongs_def: (in a good sense) transport (with love), or (in a bad sense) stultify; to make cakes

H3824.derivation: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)
H3824.strongs_def: the heart (as the most interior organ);
H3824.kjv_def: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.

H3828.strongs_def: frankincense (from its whiteness or perhaps that of its smoke)

H3830.strongs_def: a garment (literally or figuratively); by implication (euphemistically) a wife
H3830.kjv_def: apparel, clothed with, clothing, garment, raiment, vestment, vesture.
H3830.usage: clothing(9x), garment(9x), apparel(8x), vesture(2x), clothed(1x), raiment(1x), vestments(1x)

H3831.strongs_def: {a garment (literally or figuratively); by implication (euphemistically) a wife}

H3833.derivation: or (Ezekiel 19:2) לְבִיָּא; irregular masculine plural לְבָאִים; irregular feminine plural לְבָאוֹת; from an unused root meaning;  compare H738 (אֲרִי)
H3833.strongs_def: to roar; a lion (properly, a lioness as the fiercer (although not a roarer;))

H3834.derivation: or rather לְבִבָה; from H3823 (לָבַב) in its original sense of fatness (or perhaps of folding);
H3834.strongs_def: a cake (either as fried or turned)

H3835.derivation: a primitive root; also as denominative from H3843 (לְבֵנָה)
H3835.strongs_def: to be (or become) white;  to make bricks

H3837.strongs_def: Laban, a Mesopotamian; also a place in the Desert
H3837.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3838.derivation: or לְבָנָה; the same as H3842 (לְבָנָה);
H3838.strongs_def: Lebana or Lebanah, one of the Nethinim

H3839.strongs_def: some sort of whitish tree, perhaps the storax

H3841.strongs_def: Libnah, a place in the Desert and one in Palestine

H3843.strongs_def: a brick (from the whiteness of the clay)

H3844.derivation: from H3825 (לְבַב); (the) white mountain (from its snow);
H3844.strongs_def: Lebanon, a mountain range in Palestine

H3846.strongs_def: a Libnite or descendants of Libni (collectively)

H3847.strongs_def: properly, wrap around, i.e. (by implication) to put on agarment or clothe (oneself, or another), literally or figuratively
H3847.kjv_def: (in) apparel, arm, array (self), clothe (self), come upon, put (on, upon), wear.
H3847.usage: clothe(51x), put(18x), array(6x), wear(4x), armed(3x), came(3x), apparel(1x), apparelled(1x), variant(1x)

H3848.strongs_def: {properly, wrap around, i.e. (by implication) to put on agarment or clothe (oneself, or another), literally or figuratively}

H3849.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to deepen or hollow (like H3537 (כַּד));

H3850.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain signification;
H3850.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3851.derivation: from an usused root meaning to gleam;
H3851.strongs_def: a flash; figuratively, a sharply polished blade or point of aweapon

H3852.derivation: or לַהֶבֶת; feminine of H3851 (לַהַב), and meaning the same
H3852.strongs_def: {a flash; figuratively, a sharply polished blade or point of aweapon}

H3853.strongs_def: Lehabim, a son of Mizraim, and his descendants

H3854.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be eager;

H3855.derivation: from an unused root meaning to glow (compare H3851 (לַהַב)) or else to be earnest (compare H3854 (לַהַג));

H3856.derivation: a primitive root meaning properly, to burn, i.e. (by implication)
H3856.strongs_def: to be rabid (figuratively, insane); also (from the exhaustion of frenzy) to languish

H3857.strongs_def: properly, to lick, i.e. (by implication) to blaze
H3857.kjv_def: burn (up), set on fire, flaming, kindle.

H3858.strongs_def: a blaze; also (from the idea of enwrapping) magic (as covert)

H3859.strongs_def: properly, to burn in, i.e. (figuratively) to rankle

H3860.derivation: from the prepositional prefix meaning to or for and H2005 (הֵן);
H3860.kjv_def: for them (by mistake for prepositional suffix).

H3862.derivation: probably from an unused root meaning to gather;

H3863.strongs_def: a conditional particle; if; by implication (interj. as a wish) would that!
H3863.kjv_def: if (haply), peradventure, I pray thee, though, I would, would God (that).

H3864.derivation: or לֻבִּי; (Daniel 11:43), partrial from a name probably derived from an unused root meaning to thirst, i.e. a dry region; apparently
H3864.strongs_def: a Libyan or inhabitant of interior Africa (only in plural)

H3865.strongs_def: Lud, the name of two nations

H3866.strongs_def: a Ludite or inhabitants of Lud (only in plural)

H3867.strongs_def: properly, to twine, i.e. (by implication) to unite, to remain; also to borrow (as a form of obligation) or (caus.) to lend
H3867.kjv_def: abide with, borrow(-er), cleave, join (self), lend(-er).
H3867.usage: join(10x), lend(7x), borrow(3x), borrower(2x), abide(1x), cleave(1x), lender(1x)

H3868.derivation: a primitive root; (compare H3867 (לָוָה), H3874 (לוּט) and H3885 (לוּן))
H3868.strongs_def: to turn aside , i.e. (literally) to depart, (figuratively) be perverse

H3869.strongs_def: some kind of nuttree, perhaps the almond

H3870.strongs_def: Luz, the name of two places in Palestine

H3871.derivation: or לֻחַ; from a primitive root;
H3871.strongs_def: probably meaning to glisten; a tablet (as polished), of stone, wood or metal

H3872.derivation: or לֻחוֹת; (Jeremiah 48:5), from the same as H3871 (לוּחַ); floored;
H3872.strongs_def: Luchith, a place East of the Jordan

H3881.strongs_def: a Levite or descendant of Levi

H3882.strongs_def: a wreathed animal, i.e. a serpent (especially the crocodile or some other large sea-monster); figuratively, the constellation of the dragon; also as a symbol of Babylon

H3883.derivation: from an unused root meaning to fold back;

H3884.derivation: or לוּלֵי; from H3863 (לוּא) and H3808 (לֹא);
H3884.kjv_def: except, had not, if (...not), unless, were it not that.

H3885.strongs_def: to stop (usually over night); by implication, to stay permanently; hence (in a bad sense) to be obstinate (especially in words, to complain)
H3885.kjv_def: abide (all night), continue, dwell, endure, grudge, be left, lie all night, (cause to) lodge (all night, in, -ing, this night), (make to) murmur, remain, tarry (all night, that night).
H3885.usage: lodge(33x), murmur(14x), abide(7x), remain(6x), tarry(2x), continue(1x), dwell(1x), endure(1x), grudge(1x), left(1x), lie(1x), variant(3x)

H3886.strongs_def: to gulp; figuratively, to be rash

H3887.strongs_def: properly, to make mouths at, i.e. to scoff; hence (from the effort to pronounce a foreign language) to interpret, or (generally) intercede
H3887.kjv_def: ambassador, have in derision, interpreter, make a mock, mocker, scorn(-er, -ful), teacher.
H3887.usage: scorner(14x), scorn(4x), interpreter(2x), mocker(2x), ambassadors(1x), derision(1x), mock(1x), scornful(1x), teachers(1x)

H3890.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H3867 (לָוָה);

H3892.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be new;

H3894.derivation: or לָחֻם; passive participle of H3898 (לָחַם);
H3894.strongs_def: properly, eaten, i.e. food; also flesh, i.e. body

H3895.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be soft;
H3895.strongs_def: the cheek (from its fleshiness); hence, the jaw-bone

H3898.strongs_def: to feed on; figuratively, to consume; by implication, to battle (as destruction)
H3898.kjv_def: devour, eat, [idiom] ever, fight(-ing), overcome, prevail, (make) war(-ring).
H3898.usage: fight(149x), eat(5x), overcome(2x), devoured(1x), ever(1x), prevail(1x)

H3899.derivation: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)
H3899.strongs_def: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
H3899.kjv_def: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
H3899.usage: bread(237x), food(21x), meat(18x), loaves(5x), shewbread(2x), victuals(2x), eat(1x), feast(1x), fruit(1x), provision(1x)
